ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-26-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Lerche, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Plaintiff represented to the court that the case has settled. The Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to Oct-26-2021 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
